title: GrowGeneration Corp (GRWG) Q2 2021 Earnings Call Transcript
text: GrowGeneration delivered strong Q2 2021 results with revenues of $125.9 million, representing a 190% year-over-year increase. The company reported GAAP pre-tax net income of approximately $9.6 million compared to $2.7 million in the prior year period. Adjusted EBITDA grew 230% to $14.5 million. The company generated revenues of $126 million in the quarter, a 190% increase year over year with a 60% increase in same-store sales. GrowGeneration operated 58 locations across 12 states at quarter-end. The company completed 12 transactions in the first half of 2021, adding 20 new locations. Management announced the acquisition of HGS Hydro, described as the country's third largest chain of hydroponic stores, with seven locations across the state of Michigan. The company expects to reach over 70 locations by year-end 2021 and over 100 locations by 2023. Gross profit margin expanded to 28.4%, up 170 basis points year-over-year. Private label and proprietary brand sales surged dramatically, reaching $8.9 million in Q2 2021 compared to just $408,000 in the prior year period. For the first half of 2021, private label sales totaled $14.8 million versus $557,000 in 2020. The e-commerce channel experienced significant expansion, growing from $3.3 million to $12 million quarter-over-quarter, with transaction volume up 55% and approximately one million unique visitors to growgeneration.com during the period. The company raised full-year revenue guidance from $455 million to $475 million while maintaining adjusted EBITDA guidance of $54 million to $58 million.
